command_log.command: echo 'Checking environment...' && which jq && which bash
for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do echo "=== $(basename $f) ===" && jq '{workflow_name, cursor, status: .steps_completed}' "$f" 2>/dev/null; done

cat > /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/reports/env-report.md << 'REPORT'
# Environment Check Report

## Detected Tools

| Tool | Path | Status |
|------|------|--------|
| jq | /usr/bin/jq | Available |
| bash | /opt/homebrew/bin/bash | Available |

## Summary

Both required tools (jq and bash) are installed and accessible on this system. The environment check passed successfully.

- **jq**: JSON processor located at `/usr/bin/jq` (system path)
- **bash**: Shell located at `/opt/homebrew/bin/bash` (Homebrew installation)
REPORT
echo "Report written"

jq '{cursor, status, steps: [.steps[] | {id, status}]}' /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/state_0f1fe6bf-0236-4f54-bd9b-71b6b375a9bd_adccd954796af9ece.json 2>/dev/null || echo "State file gone (may have been archived)"

ls /Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.441/hooks/ 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && cat /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.claude/settings.json 2>/dev/null || echo "No project settings.json"

jq '{cursor, status, steps: [.steps[] | {id, status}]}' /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/state_0f1fe6bf-0236-4f54-bd9b-71b6b375a9bd_adccd954796af9ece.json 2>/dev/null || echo "STATE FILE GONE - checking history..." && ls /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/history/success/ 2>/dev/null
test -f reports/env-report.md && grep -q . reports/env-report.md && echo 'SUCCESS' || echo 'FAILURE'

PLUGIN_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.441" && export WHEEL_LIB_DIR="${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/state.sh" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/workflow.sh" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/dispatch.sh" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/lock.sh" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/context.sh" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/guard.sh" && WF_FILE="/Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/workflows/example.json" && STATE_FILE="/Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/state_0f1fe6bf-0236-4f54-bd9b-71b6b375a9bd_adccd954796af9ece.json" && WORKFLOW=$(workflow_load "$WF_FILE") && STATE_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel" && export WHEEL_HOOK_SCRIPT="" && export WHEEL_HOOK_INPUT='{}' && echo "--- Before ---" && jq '{cursor, steps: [.steps[] | {id, status}]}' "$STATE_FILE" && STEP_JSON=$(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq '.steps[1]') && dispatch_agent "$STEP_JSON" "stop" '{}' "$STATE_FILE" 1 > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "--- After ---" && jq '{cursor, steps: [.steps[] | {id, status}]}' "$STATE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "State file removed (archived)"

cat > /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/reports/workflow-result.md << 'REPORT'

4. **check-result** (branch) -- PASSED. Condition `grep -q SUCCESS .wheel/outputs/verify-report.txt` returned exit 0, branching to cleanup-success.
